---
title: "Python"
pagetitle: "Python"
date: "2025-01-04"
date-title: "Date Added"
author: "Austin Thompson"
author-title: "Contributor"
short-description: "Python is a high-level, general-purpose programming language. Its design philosophy emphasizes code readability with the use of significant indentation. Python is dynamically-typed and garbage-collected. It supports multiple programming paradigms, including structured, object-oriented, and functional programming."
resource-link: "https://www.python.org/"
categories:
 - OS Tools
 - Open Data
 - Open Methods
 - For Scientists
 - Free
editor: source
---

----
## About this Resource
{{< meta short-description >}}
\

[Visit Resource]({{< meta resource-link >}}){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" data-toggle="button"}
